code.description: Stable machine-readable error code when available; existing clients can continue to read error.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous query page.

scalar_eq.description: Scalar equality predicates keyed by schema scalar column.

text_field.description: Optional schema text-indexed column to search. When omitted, TraceDB searches all text-indexed columns for backwards-compatible fieldless queries.

vector_field.description: Optional schema vector column to score. When omitted, TraceDB uses the first vector column for backwards-compatible fieldless queries.

RecordPutBody.description: Full replacement record write body. The server accepts either RecordInput directly or a wrapper with record.

RecordPutRequest.description: Full replacement record write. The server also accepts RecordInput directly.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous scan page.

TableSchema.description: TraceDB table schema. Names must use GraphQL-safe identifiers; schema apply rejects duplicate columns, overlapping scalar/text/vector columns, reserved TraceDB result metadata fields, and undeclared vector source columns before WAL append.

bearerAuth.description: Required by gateway-managed routes; direct local engine development can use any token.

info.description:
SQL compatibility is not implemented.
Internal TraceDB-only runs are development evidence; exported performance claims require an external control and a number to beat.
Idempotency-Key supports local data-dir-backed replay for mutation and admin routes after successful local cache writes; SDK idempotent retries are opt-in and require an Idempotency-Key; cross-replica and crash-atomic exactly-once idempotency remain future work.
info.title: TraceDB v1 HTTP API

post.description: Current TraceDB v1 product route. This OpenAPI artifact is generated from the checked-in route manifest.

parameters.description: Optional local data-dir-backed replay key scoped by method and path. After a successful local cache write, same key plus same raw request body replays the first successful response; same key with a different body returns 409 Conflict.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

409.description: Idempotency key was reused with a different request body.
